progress_summary: v1.5.0 'Build the AI app' is SHIPPED and LIVE on opchain.dev (2026-06-22). The session that started 2026-06-21 from a hard PM↔code drift — Linear had batch-closed the v1.5 tree Done on 2026-05-26 while NONE of it existed in code — is fully resolved end to end. Built and merged across 7 PRs, all CI-green: #299 reconciliation + deploy-lag canary hardening; #300 Sprint 1 (four AI-native skill scaffolds + ai-native phase + flag registry); #303 Sprint 2 (oc-claude-api + oc-rag-forge bodies + 4 oc-stack-forge vector-db packs pgvector/pinecone/turbopuffer/supabase-vectors + app-architect AI-app /discover branch); #306 Sprint 3 (oc-agent-forge + oc-prompt-ops bodies + oc-code-auditor AI-safety rule pack/signatures/'Phase: AI app?' sweep + prompts/opchain-eval dogfooding eval set); #309 Sprint 4 (GTM surfaces /ai-recipes, /blog +RSS +2 posts, /for-agencies, footer newsletter→/api/notify, /compare 'Build AI apps' row); #311 Sprint 5 release cut (lockstep all 22 skills→1.5.0, styleguide badge, homepage pill, /changelog v1.5 promoted to Just Released); #316 deferred tail (pipeline-builder AI-app branch + per-skill OG cards). Linear: ADEV-344 + children + ADEV-364 (release) all Done. DEPLOY: the Cloudflare Managed-Challenge that had blocked /api/health + /mcp (and blinded the deploy-lag canary) was cleared by the user; v1.4.3 Codex/MCP + all of v1.5 are now serving in prod. deploy-lag canary patched to fail loudly on the challenge body. No deploy-lag tracking issue outstanding.

key_decisions: v1.4 theme: coverage-as-a-plugin-registry. skills/stack-forge/packs/<id>/pack.yml + reference docs replace hardcoded stack tables.
Apple/iOS ships in v1.4.0 (PR 6) — pressure-tests the kind: mobile dispatch branch. Android/Flutter/RN deferred to v1.5 once release-ops handles Play Store + EAS.

Distribution model: bundle-everything in opchain-skills.zip. Per-pack flags (skills.coverage.<pack-id>.enabled) filter what stack-forge OFFERS, not what's downloaded — keeps regulated/air-gapped installs intact.
5 skills version-bump 1.2.0 → 1.4.0 (stack-forge, api-dev, deploy-ops, app-architect, migration-ops). Other ~13 skills stay at 1.2.0.
8-PR sequencing: PRs 1-3 serial (architecture → backfill → dispatcher), PRs 4-7 parallelizable, PR 8 last (release).
ADEV-333 was created in error during scope shift; cancelled as duplicate of ADEV-332.

LHCI a11y failures on #187 (TOC touch size, code-block contrast, band labels, changelog links) are pre-existing — unrelated to the JSON-only diff. Standing up as ADEV-338 family on a separate branch off main, NOT BLOCKING v1.4.

.checkpoints/git-ops.checkpoint.json (last-merge-#183 → #189; PRs #185-#189 added to merged_prs; project_dir corrected)
.opchain/pm.yaml (v1.3.0 archived to previous_releases; v1.4.0 active with ADEV-327 parent + 8 PRs; key renamed sprints → prs in both)
user_preferences: Pulls scope INTO releases when it expands the value prop; comfortable with bigger releases when the PR sequence is clear.
Asks sharp clarifying questions about user-visible mechanics (downloads vs visibility, plugin pattern) before approving implementation.
Wants Linear kept current with the actual plan — re-aligns tickets when scope shifts.
Approves merges promptly once CI is green; deploys are always manual.
Skips non-actionable bot replies on PRs (no noise back to LHCI bot).

next_actions: v1.5 is DONE and live — no v1.5 work remains. Next theme is v1.6 'Cost & telemetry' per roadmap/07-v15-v16-v17-roadmap.md: cost attribution + opt-in telemetry, and the first oc-checkpoint-protocol bump since v1.2 (adds cost, eval_scores, telemetry_handle). No tickets cut yet; create the ADEV v1.6 parent + sprint children when kicking off.

Housekeeping: the other skill checkpoints were refreshed in this same reconciliation (app-architect, stack-forge, code-auditor, git-ops, ux-engineer) to read 'v1.5 shipped'. oc-code-auditor should run a real post-release sweep at some point — the v1.4 dispatcher refactor (ADEV-330) and the v1.5 cycle shipped without a full code-auditor pass (only the AI-safety rule pack was added, not run).
Optional: verify opchain.dev sending domain in Resend + `wrangler secret put RESEND_API_KEY` before flipping the email-pipeline flag on (still gated off).

reconciliation_2026_05_15.trigger: GitHub's auto-merge of origin/main into the PR branch (commit 1a3293a, authored by asfbay-bit) overlapped with the prior reconcile in commit 2c1f381. The auto-merge took both versions of three conflict regions (header, progress_table, next_actions) without adding the inter-section commas that JSON requires; checkpoint:validate failed on the resulting file at line 40 col 5, breaking the Worker CI step.
reconciliation_2026_05_15.fix: Hand-rewrote orchestrator.checkpoint.json to consolidate the two branches' content into a single valid document: kept theirs' v1.4-shipped / v1.5-planning narrative, appended the email-pipeline thread, deduplicated progress_table rows, and put the PR #233 watch action at the top of next_actions.

pr_wave_2026_05_31.trigger: User invoked /orchestrator asking which PRs needed review and which were ready to merge. Surfaced 13 open PRs (4 feature, 9 Dependabot) — actioned all in one session.
notable_actions: Resolved 3 site/package-lock.json conflict cascades by re-updating branches in dependency order after each merge.
Triggered `@dependabot rebase` on #173 and #176 after first-pass conflicts; #173 also required `@dependabot recreate` (which bumped wrangler 4.90→4.95 latest).
Verified #209 (js-yaml major v3→v4) safe to merge by grepping all 5 callsites — all use only `yaml.load(string)` which is behavior-compatible across the major.
Closed #208 rather than rebasing because the underlying stale-baseline bug it fixed no longer exists on main (v1.4 PRs landed correct baselines).
